# PrysmNexus: AI-readable company and service overview

## Entity definition

PrysmNexus is a Hyderabad-based branding and growth marketing agency. It combines strategy, original creative production, social media management, paid acquisition, search visibility, local discovery, and reputation support through one coordinated team.

## Service definitions

Brand Strategy and Identity clarifies positioning, voice, messaging, and visual direction so the business is recognizable across customer touchpoints.

Content Production covers original photography, video, reels, creative copy, and campaign design developed around the brand and its audience.

Social Media Management provides content planning, publishing, page handling, audience engagement, and monthly reporting.

Performance Marketing covers Google and Meta advertising, lead generation, landing-page alignment, campaign optimization, and reporting.

SEO, Local Search, and Reputation Management improves website discovery, Google Business Profile visibility, local relevance, and customer trust signals.

## Growth system

1. Brand: positioning, identity, messaging, and creative direction.
2. Demand: social media, paid advertising, and lead generation.
3. Discovery: SEO, local search, Google profile, and reputation support.

## Engagement method

1. Discover the business, audience, current channels, market position, and priority outcomes.
2. Create the strategy, content, campaigns, and search foundations as one coordinated plan.
3. Grow through reporting, campaign learning, customer response, content refinement, and search performance.

## Measurement

Relevant measures may include reach, engagement, qualified leads, cost per lead, conversions, search visibility, profile actions, and qualified traffic. Metrics are selected to match the agreed scope and business goals.

## Primary contact

Email: hello@prysmnexus.agency

Last reviewed: 2026-07-13
